name: web_browser
description: Allows Prometheus to interact with a web browser. Capabilities include navigation, clicking, typing, and extracting content.

action.description: The action to perform in the browser.

url.description: The URL to navigate to (required for 'navigate' action).

selector.description: The CSS selector for the element (required for 'click' and 'type' actions).

text.description: The text to type into the input field (required for 'type' action).
